The beginning of the intensive, I recommend you start with a visioning exercise. Help them get clarity. That's the first move that I make in every intensive that I do. And I don't make it anything more complicated usually than maybe a whiteboard or a giant post-it on the wall with the words, I am at the center. And I set a timer and put some spa music on and let them go to town with different colored markers and get them to vision for themselves. What do you want?
